programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh investigates America's daring response to Pearl Harbor, which destroyed a vital Japanese base in the South Pacific; using brand-new intel, Josh dives in with Project Recover to find 40 planes and 200 American heroes lost in Operation Hailstone.

programme.sub-title: Finding the Lost Pilots of WW2

programme.sub-title: Lost Bomber of World War II

programme.title: Expedition Unknown

programme.title: Expedition Unknown

programme.desc: Four teams compete in the Knockout Match 1 of the Patriot Cup to advance to the Championship. From Oxford, Ala.

programme.title: Fight Sports: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing action.

programme.title: The Best of Me
programme.desc: Amanda and Dawson, who were once high-school sweethearts, have a bittersweet reunion when they return to their hometown for the funeral of a mutual friend. Seeing each other again after 20 years apart reignites the love they've never forgotten, but Amanda and Dawson soon discover that the forces that drove them apart when they were younger pose even more threats today.

programme.title: Happy, Texas
programme.desc: When bank robbers Harry (Jeremy Northam) and Wayne (Steve Zahn) escape from prison and stumble into the tiny Texas Panhandle town of Happy, they're mistaken for the gay couple who were scheduled to help plan the town's child beauty pageant. As the criminals take advantage of the misapprehension to lie low while planning their next heist, complications include the local sheriff (William H. Macy) and his attraction to Harry, and Wayne's feelings for schoolteacher Ms. Schaefer (Illeana Douglas).

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: Dr. Don Shirley is a world-class African-American pianist who's about to embark on a concert tour in the Deep South in 1962. In need of a driver and protection, Shirley recruits Tony Lip, a tough-talking bouncer from an Italian-American neighborhood in the Bronx. Despite their differences, the two men soon develop an unexpected bond while confronting racism and danger in an era of segregation.

programme.title: Crisis
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her son's disappearance.

programme.title: Breakdown
programme.desc: While traveling to California, Taylor and his wife, Amy, experience a vehicle malfunction on a remote highway. Amy Taylor accepts a ride from a truck driver to seek assistance while Jeff Taylor remains with the vehicle. When the couple fails to reunite at a designated location, Jeff Taylor begins a search for his wife despite a lack of assistance from local residents or law enforcement.

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: In the midst of the Great Depression, a businessman (Jeff Bridges) coping with the tragic death of his son, a jockey with a history of brutal injuries (Tobey Maguire) and a down-and-out horse trainer (Chris Cooper) team up to help Seabiscuit, a temperamental, undersized racehorse. At first the horse struggles to win, but eventually Seabiscuit becomes one of the most successful thoroughbreds of all time, and inspires a nation at a time when it needs it most.

programme.title: The Virgin Suicides
programme.desc: In an ordinary suburban house, on a lovely tree-lined street, in the middle of 1970s America, lived the five beautiful, dreamy Lisbon sisters, whose doomed fates indelibly marked the neighborhood boys who to this day continue to obsess over them. A story of love and repression, fantasy and terror, sex and death, memory and longing. It is at its core a mystery story: a heart-rending investigation into the impenetrable, life-altering secrets of American adolescence.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love
programme.desc: "Shakespeare in Love" is a romantic comedy for the 1990s set in the 1590s. It imaginatively unfolds the witty, sexy and timeless tale behind the creation of the greatest love story ever told. A young Shakespeare is out of cash and ideas; he meets his ideal woman and she inspires him to write one of his most famous plays.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance
programme.desc: Sara moves from a small Midwestern town to the south side of Chicago when her mother dies in a car accident, and must live with her father. She soon falls for an African American teenager at her new high school, and he has less than an idyllic past. They share a love for dance (ballet and hip hop respectively) and together they tackle the problems that go with an interracial relationship.

programme.title: Nebraska
programme.desc: Cantankerous old buzzard Woody Grant can barely walk down the street of his home in Billings, Mont., without stopping for a drink. So when Woody receives receives a sweepstakes notice in the mail and insists on making a 750-mile trip to Lincoln, Neb., to collect his prize, it falls to baffled son David to accompany him. During a stop in their Nebraska hometown, word gets out about Woody's fortune, first making him a hero, then later, the target of predatory people.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: In the midst of the Great Depression, a businessman (Jeff Bridges) coping with the tragic death of his son, a jockey with a history of brutal injuries (Tobey Maguire) and a down-and-out horse trainer (Chris Cooper) team up to help Seabiscuit, a temperamental, undersized racehorse. At first the horse struggles to win, but eventually Seabiscuit becomes one of the most successful thoroughbreds of all time, and inspires a nation at a time when it needs it most.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio
programme.desc: Evelyn Ryan (Julianne Moore) suffers in her marriage to Kelly (Woody Harrelson), a slovenly alcoholic whose only consistent quality is his utter lack of respect for her. As Evelyn struggles to make ends meet and care for their 10 children, she begins to turn to contests as a source of entertainment and much-needed income. To the amazement of her friends and family, Evelyn's quick wit leads her to pen prizewinning amateur jingles and one-liners for products all across the spectrum.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio
programme.desc: Evelyn Ryan (Julianne Moore) suffers in her marriage to Kelly (Woody Harrelson), a slovenly alcoholic whose only consistent quality is his utter lack of respect for her. As Evelyn struggles to make ends meet and care for their 10 children, she begins to turn to contests as a source of entertainment and much-needed income. To the amazement of her friends and family, Evelyn's quick wit leads her to pen prizewinning amateur jingles and one-liners for products all across the spectrum.

programme.title: The Hoax
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, author Clifford Irving (Richard Gere), with accomplice Richard Suskind (Alfred Molina), attempts to pull off one of the greatest media scams of the century. He writes a fake biography of reclusive billionaire Howard Hughes, claiming that Hughes authorized it, and sells the book to publishing giant McGraw-Hill.

programme.title: The Road
programme.desc: America is a grim, gray shadow of itself after a catastrophe. A man (Viggo Mortensen) and his young son (Kodi Smit-McPhee) wander through this post-apocalyptic world, trying to keep the dream of civilization alive. They journey toward the sea, surviving as best they can on what they can scavenge, and try to avoid roving gangs of savage humans who will turn them into slaves, or worse.

programme.title: Barron's Cove
programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his son's death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, he's left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men
programme.desc: While out hunting, Llewelyn Moss (Josh Brolin) finds the grisly aftermath of a drug deal. Though he knows better, he cannot resist the cash left behind and takes it with him. The hunter becomes the hunted when a merciless killer named Chigurh (Javier Bardem) picks up his trail. Also looking for Moss is Sheriff Bell (Tommy Lee Jones), an aging lawman who reflects on a changing world and a dark secret of his own, as he tries to find and protect Moss.

programme.title: The Legend of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, Georgia socialite Adele Invergordon announces a publicity-garnering high-stakes match at her struggling family golf course, featuring the greatest golfers of the era. Once-promising local golfer Rannulph Junuh, whose career and life were derailed by World War I, is brought in to play alongside the stars, but his game is weak — until the enigmatic Bagger Vance offers to coach him back into the great golfer he once was.

programme.title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape
programme.desc: Gilbert Grape (Johnny Depp) is a small-town young man with a lot of responsibility. Chief among his concerns are his mother (Darlene Cates), who is so overweight that she can't leave the house, and his mentally impaired younger brother, Arnie (Leonardo DiCaprio), who has a knack for finding trouble. Settled into a job at a grocery store and an ongoing affair with local woman Betty Carver (Mary Steenburgen), Gilbert finally has his life shaken up by the free-spirited Becky (Juliette Lewis).

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: Quan is a humble London businessman whose long-buried past erupts in a revenge-fueled vendetta when the only person left for him to love -- his teenage daughter -- dies in a senseless act of politically motivated terrorism. His relentless search to find the terrorists leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose own past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Two years before the Civil War, Django (Jamie Foxx), a slave, finds himself accompanying an unorthodox German bounty hunter named Dr. King Schultz (Christoph Waltz) on a mission to capture the vicious Brittle brothers. Their mission successful, Schultz frees Django, and together they hunt the South's most-wanted criminals. Their travels take them to the infamous plantation of shady Calvin Candie (Leonardo DiCaprio), where Django's long-lost wife (Kerry Washington) is still a slave.

programme.title: The Contractor
programme.desc: Involuntarily discharged from the Army, a special forces sergeant lands a contract with a private underground military force. When his very first assignment goes awry, the elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The stars of a 1970s sci-fi show -- now scraping a living through re-runs and sci-fi conventions are beamed aboard an alien spacecraft. Believing the cast's heroic on-screen dramas are historical documents of real-life adventures, the band of aliens turns to the ailing celebrities for help in their quest to overcome the oppressive regime in their solar system.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: This live action feature is inspired by the most successful interactive video-game character in history -- Lara Croft. Beautiful and brainy, Lara is the heroine of Eidos Interactive's phenomenally successful "Tomb Raider" game series. It is one woman's fearless quest crisscrossing the globe, in an amazing attempt to save the world.

programme.title: A Mighty Heart
programme.desc: Mariane Pearl (Angelina Jolie), the wife of journalist Daniel Pearl (Dan Futterman) of The Wall Street Journal, heads to Pakistan after terrorists capture her husband. In the terrifying weeks that follow, she must cope with international attention and find her way through the dangerous world of underground politics in a desperate effort to find him.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: A big screen spin-off of the "Saturday Night Live" skit. Rob Lowe plays a producer that wants to take the public access "Wayne's World" to the world of commercial television. Wayne (Mike Myers) and Garth (Dana Carvey) battle to save their show and Wayne's girlfriend from Lowe.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2
programme.desc: After Wayne Campbell (Mike Myers) has a dream in which Jim Morrison tells him to put on a rock concert, he and fellow late-night TV star Garth Algar (Dana Carvey) try their hand at promoting. Several musical acts show little interest, leaving the pair uncertain about their ability to put on a successful show. Meanwhile, Cassandra (Tia Carrere), Wayne's rock star girlfriend, has a new manager (Christopher Walken) who is trying to steal her away, and Wayne's antics only make things worse.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Struggling new attorney Rudy Baylor (Matt Damon) resorts to working for a shady lawyer (Mickey Rourke), where he meets paralegal Deck Shifflet (Danny DeVito). When the insurance company of Dot Black (Mary Kay Place) refuses her dying son coverage, Baylor and Shifflet team up to fight the corrupt corporation, taking on its callous lawyer (Jon Voight). Meanwhile, Baylor becomes involved with Kelly Riker (Claire Danes), an abused wife, whose husband complicates matters when he confronts Baylor.

programme.title: Jay and Silent Bob Strike Back
programme.desc: When Jay and Silent Bob learn that a Bluntman and Chronic movie is being made featuring their comic book counterparts, they drool at the thought of fat movie checks rolling in. But when the pair find that there won't be any royalties coming their way, they set out to sabotage the flick at all costs.

programme.title: Vindicta
programme.desc: When a city is terrorized by a sadistic serial killer, a seasoned detective and a newly recruited paramedic are forced into a deadly game of vengeance, only to discover the key to stopping the bloodshed lies in unlocking the truth of their own pasts.

programme.title: Deadlock
programme.desc: Wanted criminal Ron Whitlock leads a rogue team of mercenaries on a mission of vengeance. Convinced that the government is working against them, the merciless group brutally seizes an energy plant and holds everyone inside hostage. With a nearby town on the brink of massive flooding and destruction, it's up to a retired Army ranger to save thousands of innocent lives before it's too late.

programme.title: Bang Bang
programme.desc: Following Bang Bang Rozyski, an eccentric retired pugilist obsessed with rectifying the sins of his past.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Asking for It
programme.desc: A victim of sexual assault joins an all-female gang that targets violent frat boys and a corrupt police force of human traffickers.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-head Do America
programme.desc: Two of the biggest animated slackers around, Beavis (Mike Judge) and Butt-head (also Judge) get a kick-start when two crooks steal their TV. On their mission to find a replacement, Beavis and Butt-head wind up in the motel of Muddy Grimes (Bruce Willis), where a case of mistaken identity has them after his wife, Dallas (Demi Moore). Due to misunderstanding Grimes when he says to "do" his wife, the two travel from Las Vegas to Washington, not realizing they've been sent out to kill the woman.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: When North Korean ruler Kim Jong-il (Trey Parker) orchestrates a global terrorist plot, it's up to the heavily armed marionettes of the highly specialized Team America unit to stop his dastardly scheme. The group, which includes the thespian-averse technology expert Chris (Matt Stone), not only has to face off against Jong-il, but they must also contend with F.A.G., the Film Actors Guild, a cadre of Hollywood liberals at odds with Team America's "policing the world" tactics.

programme.title: Cool World
programme.desc: After a bizarre incident, Frank Harris is transported into the cartoon realm of Cool World, where he remains the only human among various animated characters for years. Eventually, artist Jack Deebs also enters Cool World and sets his lustful sights on his own creation, a blond bombshell named Holli Would. However, excessive intermingling between cartoons and humans is said to lead to dire consequences, a risk Jack seems ready to take.

programme.title: A.C.O.D.
programme.desc: An attempt to negotiate a truce between his bitterly divorced parents sends a man (Adam Scott) back to his childhood therapist, where he learns he was the subject of her self-help book.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan
programme.desc: Tired of waiting for Mr. Right while her biological clock ticks away, Zoe (Jennifer Lopez) decides it's time to make an appointment at the sperm bank. On the same day as her procedure, she meets Stan (Alex O'Loughlin), a man with the potential to be her ideal mate. When Stan learns that Zoe's unpredictable behavior is the result of her pregnancy, he declares his commitment. As the due date approaches, both lovers realize that they really don't know each other without a baby in the picture.

programme.title: Pretty Red Dress
programme.desc: The story of Travis, Candice and their daughter, Kenisha, and their relationships with the same red dress.

programme.title: Pretty Red Dress
programme.desc: The story of Travis, Candice and their daughter, Kenisha, and their relationships with the same red dress.

programme.title: Into the Wild
programme.desc: A top student and athlete leaves his middle-class life to venture into Alaska, only to meet people who will eventually shape his values and life.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: South Park: Bigger, Longer & Uncut
programme.desc: In this feature film based on the hit animated series, the third-graders of South Park sneak into an R-rated film by ultra-vulgar Canadian television personalities Terrance (Matt Stone) and Phillip (Trey Parker), and emerge with expanded vocabularies that leave their parents and teachers scandalized. When outraged Americans try to censor the film, the controversy becomes a call to war with Canada, and Terrance and Phillip end up on death row -- with only the kids left to save them.

programme.title: Youth in Revolt
programme.desc: As a fan of Albert Camus and Jean-Luc Godard, teenage Nick Twisp is definitely out of his element when his mother and her boyfriend move the family to a trailer park. When a pretty neighbor named Sheeni plays records by French crooners, it's love at first sight for frustrated and inexperienced Nick. Learning that she is dating someone, Nick launches a hilarious quest to find his way into Sheeni's heart -- and bed.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Experience the friendships, romances and adventures of a group of high school kids in the 1950s. Welcome to the singing and dancing world of "Grease," the most successful movie musical of all time. A wholesome exchange student (Olivia Newton-John) and a leather-clad Danny (John Travolta) have a summer romance, but will it cross clique lines?

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: Set in 1973, it chronicles the funny and often poignant coming of age of 15-year-old William, an unabashed music fan who is inspired by the seminal bands of the time. When his love of music lands him an assignment from Rolling Stone Magazine to interview the up-and-coming band Stillwater -- fronted by lead guitar Russell Hammond and lead singer Jeff Bebe, William embarks on an eye-opening journey with the band's tour, despite the objections of his protective mother.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: Adventureland
programme.desc: It's the summer of 1987, and recent college grad James Brennan (Jesse Eisenberg) can't wait to begin his long-anticipated dream trip to Europe. Unfortunately, James' plans come to a screeching halt when his parents announce that they are unable to subsidize his trip. Forced to take a job at the local amusement park, James prepares for the worst summer ever, until he finds love with a captivating co-worker named Em (Kristen Stewart).

programme.title: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: A mercenary takes on the job of tracking a high-value asset known only as "The Ghost" on an international flight. Realizing the plane is filled with assassins assigned to kill them both, the pair must work together in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
programme.desc: When father and son coroners investigate the death of a beautiful "Jane Doe," they find increasingly bizarre clues.

programme.title: The Kite Runner
programme.desc: After many years living in the U.S., Amir, an Afghan novelist, returns to his Taliban-controlled homeland to learn the fate of his murdered friend's son.

programme.title: Freedom's Path
programme.desc: When Union soldier William runs from battle, he's taken to safety by a heroic young Black man. Kitch is part of a secret community of freed slaves running a section of the Underground Railroad, but a desperate slave catcher is on their trail.

programme.desc: An indecisive Chicago couple is struggling to compromise on a new home; he wants a turnkey, single-family home with a big yard, but she's hoping for a home with vintage charm and is willing to take a fixer-upper.

programme.desc: At the world-famous Iowa State Fair, sampling some award-winning new food items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway: the Pork-Tato, the Hash Brown Handful.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Wisconsin State Fair, where a local brewery is serving a deep-fried combo of beer, brats and cheese curds; milk and cookies are inverted; a combination of onion rings and a grilled hot dog; cold brew coffee treat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the Double Dutch Almond Funnel that has everyone jumping with joy; giant Jupiter Burger; spicy Solar Flare; sweet Space Coast Softball.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah heads to the Big Fresno Fair in California for the debut of some new fair foods, including the Flamin' Hot Chimichanga and Rainbow Shrimp Fries; new spin on the classic hot dog and one of the wackiest deep-fried desserts ever.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Saint Paul Winter Carnival; the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake; Lil' Corn Cakes and an ooey-gooey S'Mores Chimney Stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: The loaded Campfire Burger and Wisconsin's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick; Spanish Queens, a unique deep-fried treat; coffee gets a fresh take in the form of the Funnel-Latte; pork pickle pizza; deep-fried Reuben.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together; the Elephant Ear Taco is a new take on a fairground favorite; and the Peanut Pop Shake has Noah all shook up.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French onion soup'r stick; the Wisconsin hot chicken bomb; the deep-fried old-fashioned dessert; the Indy burger, a new take on the funnel cake.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: Performers from the Broadway musical Bright Star take on the stars of the musical Fun Home in flipping challenges that include a Period Piece, a Spotlight on Design and Improvised Design.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip
programme.desc: Husband and wife take on a father-daughter duo; a side table made from a wooden card catalogue; a coffee table made from motorcycle fenders.

programme.title: The Tillman Story
programme.desc: The family of professional football player turned soldier Pat Tillman sets out to explore and uncover the real story behind their son's death in April 2004 when he was serving in Afghanistan. Tillman, killed not by the Taliban as had first been reported, but instead by friendly fire, left a million-dollar career to serve the United States. But, while searching for the truth, his family uncovers more than the real story -- they expose a shocking propagandistic military cover-up.

programme.title: Rise and Fall: The World Trade Center
programme.desc: Two dozen interviews with those who helped create and construct the Twin Towers, those who worked in them, and those who ultimately survived their terrible ending on 9/11.

programme.desc: Filmmaker Barbara Kopple examines a failed U.S. military operation to rescue hostages in Tehran, Iran, in 1980.

programme.title: Dateline

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Years after a Montana man is found dead, his son dreads what he'll find when he opens up the box of case files, giving him insight into what really happened.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Archie McFarland was stabbed to death and his murder went unsolved for twenty-five years.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: The battle between a wife and a mistress for one man's heart leads to a deadly car chase.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: The FBI gets involved when a Virginia man's wife and son are kidnapped while vacationing in the Philippines, with a terrorist group demanding millions in ransom.

programme.title: Morning Joe: Weekend
programme.desc: Hosts Joe Scarborough, Mika Brzezinski and Willie Geist present in-depth and informed discussions that help drive the day's current political conversation.

programme.title: Muriel's Wedding
programme.desc: Socially awkward Muriel Heslop (Toni Collette) wants nothing more than to get married. Unfortunately, due to her oppressive politician father (Bill Hunter), Muriel has never even been on a date. Ostracized by her more socially adept friends, Muriel runs into fellow outcast Rhonda Epinstalk (Rachel Griffiths), and the two move from their small Australian town to the big city of Sydney, where Muriel changes her name and begins the arduous task of redesigning her life to match her fantasies.

programme.title: Anything Else
programme.desc: A writer (Jason Biggs) has problems with his live-in girlfriend (Christina Ricci) and an obsessive teacher (Woody Allen) with a history of mental illness.

programme.title: The Best of Me
programme.desc: Amanda and Dawson, who were once high-school sweethearts, have a bittersweet reunion when they return to their hometown for the funeral of a mutual friend. Seeing each other again after 20 years apart reignites the love they've never forgotten, but Amanda and Dawson soon discover that the forces that drove them apart when they were younger pose even more threats today.

programme.title: Happy, Texas
programme.desc: When bank robbers Harry (Jeremy Northam) and Wayne (Steve Zahn) escape from prison and stumble into the tiny Texas Panhandle town of Happy, they're mistaken for the gay couple who were scheduled to help plan the town's child beauty pageant. As the criminals take advantage of the misapprehension to lie low while planning their next heist, complications include the local sheriff (William H. Macy) and his attraction to Harry, and Wayne's feelings for schoolteacher Ms. Schaefer (Illeana Douglas).

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: Dr. Don Shirley is a world-class African-American pianist who's about to embark on a concert tour in the Deep South in 1962. In need of a driver and protection, Shirley recruits Tony Lip, a tough-talking bouncer from an Italian-American neighborhood in the Bronx. Despite their differences, the two men soon develop an unexpected bond while confronting racism and danger in an era of segregation.

programme.title: Crisis
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her son's disappearance.

programme.title: Breakdown
programme.desc: While traveling to California, Taylor and his wife, Amy, experience a vehicle malfunction on a remote highway. Amy Taylor accepts a ride from a truck driver to seek assistance while Jeff Taylor remains with the vehicle. When the couple fails to reunite at a designated location, Jeff Taylor begins a search for his wife despite a lack of assistance from local residents or law enforcement.

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: In the midst of the Great Depression, a businessman (Jeff Bridges) coping with the tragic death of his son, a jockey with a history of brutal injuries (Tobey Maguire) and a down-and-out horse trainer (Chris Cooper) team up to help Seabiscuit, a temperamental, undersized racehorse. At first the horse struggles to win, but eventually Seabiscuit becomes one of the most successful thoroughbreds of all time, and inspires a nation at a time when it needs it most.

programme.title: The Virgin Suicides
programme.desc: In an ordinary suburban house, on a lovely tree-lined street, in the middle of 1970s America, lived the five beautiful, dreamy Lisbon sisters, whose doomed fates indelibly marked the neighborhood boys who to this day continue to obsess over them. A story of love and repression, fantasy and terror, sex and death, memory and longing. It is at its core a mystery story: a heart-rending investigation into the impenetrable, life-altering secrets of American adolescence.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love
programme.desc: "Shakespeare in Love" is a romantic comedy for the 1990s set in the 1590s. It imaginatively unfolds the witty, sexy and timeless tale behind the creation of the greatest love story ever told. A young Shakespeare is out of cash and ideas; he meets his ideal woman and she inspires him to write one of his most famous plays.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance
programme.desc: Sara moves from a small Midwestern town to the south side of Chicago when her mother dies in a car accident, and must live with her father. She soon falls for an African American teenager at her new high school, and he has less than an idyllic past. They share a love for dance (ballet and hip hop respectively) and together they tackle the problems that go with an interracial relationship.

programme.title: Nebraska
programme.desc: Cantankerous old buzzard Woody Grant can barely walk down the street of his home in Billings, Mont., without stopping for a drink. So when Woody receives receives a sweepstakes notice in the mail and insists on making a 750-mile trip to Lincoln, Neb., to collect his prize, it falls to baffled son David to accompany him. During a stop in their Nebraska hometown, word gets out about Woody's fortune, first making him a hero, then later, the target of predatory people.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: In the midst of the Great Depression, a businessman (Jeff Bridges) coping with the tragic death of his son, a jockey with a history of brutal injuries (Tobey Maguire) and a down-and-out horse trainer (Chris Cooper) team up to help Seabiscuit, a temperamental, undersized racehorse. At first the horse struggles to win, but eventually Seabiscuit becomes one of the most successful thoroughbreds of all time, and inspires a nation at a time when it needs it most.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio
programme.desc: Evelyn Ryan (Julianne Moore) suffers in her marriage to Kelly (Woody Harrelson), a slovenly alcoholic whose only consistent quality is his utter lack of respect for her. As Evelyn struggles to make ends meet and care for their 10 children, she begins to turn to contests as a source of entertainment and much-needed income. To the amazement of her friends and family, Evelyn's quick wit leads her to pen prizewinning amateur jingles and one-liners for products all across the spectrum.

programme.title: The Hoax
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, author Clifford Irving (Richard Gere), with accomplice Richard Suskind (Alfred Molina), attempts to pull off one of the greatest media scams of the century. He writes a fake biography of reclusive billionaire Howard Hughes, claiming that Hughes authorized it, and sells the book to publishing giant McGraw-Hill.

programme.title: The Road
programme.desc: America is a grim, gray shadow of itself after a catastrophe. A man (Viggo Mortensen) and his young son (Kodi Smit-McPhee) wander through this post-apocalyptic world, trying to keep the dream of civilization alive. They journey toward the sea, surviving as best they can on what they can scavenge, and try to avoid roving gangs of savage humans who will turn them into slaves, or worse.

programme.title: Barron's Cove
programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his son's death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, he's left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men
programme.desc: While out hunting, Llewelyn Moss (Josh Brolin) finds the grisly aftermath of a drug deal. Though he knows better, he cannot resist the cash left behind and takes it with him. The hunter becomes the hunted when a merciless killer named Chigurh (Javier Bardem) picks up his trail. Also looking for Moss is Sheriff Bell (Tommy Lee Jones), an aging lawman who reflects on a changing world and a dark secret of his own, as he tries to find and protect Moss.

programme.title: The Legend of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, Georgia socialite Adele Invergordon announces a publicity-garnering high-stakes match at her struggling family golf course, featuring the greatest golfers of the era. Once-promising local golfer Rannulph Junuh, whose career and life were derailed by World War I, is brought in to play alongside the stars, but his game is weak — until the enigmatic Bagger Vance offers to coach him back into the great golfer he once was.

programme.title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape
programme.desc: Gilbert Grape (Johnny Depp) is a small-town young man with a lot of responsibility. Chief among his concerns are his mother (Darlene Cates), who is so overweight that she can't leave the house, and his mentally impaired younger brother, Arnie (Leonardo DiCaprio), who has a knack for finding trouble. Settled into a job at a grocery store and an ongoing affair with local woman Betty Carver (Mary Steenburgen), Gilbert finally has his life shaken up by the free-spirited Becky (Juliette Lewis).

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: Quan is a humble London businessman whose long-buried past erupts in a revenge-fueled vendetta when the only person left for him to love -- his teenage daughter -- dies in a senseless act of politically motivated terrorism. His relentless search to find the terrorists leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose own past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Two years before the Civil War, Django (Jamie Foxx), a slave, finds himself accompanying an unorthodox German bounty hunter named Dr. King Schultz (Christoph Waltz) on a mission to capture the vicious Brittle brothers. Their mission successful, Schultz frees Django, and together they hunt the South's most-wanted criminals. Their travels take them to the infamous plantation of shady Calvin Candie (Leonardo DiCaprio), where Django's long-lost wife (Kerry Washington) is still a slave.

programme.title: The Contractor
programme.desc: Involuntarily discharged from the Army, a special forces sergeant lands a contract with a private underground military force. When his very first assignment goes awry, the elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The stars of a 1970s sci-fi show -- now scraping a living through re-runs and sci-fi conventions are beamed aboard an alien spacecraft. Believing the cast's heroic on-screen dramas are historical documents of real-life adventures, the band of aliens turns to the ailing celebrities for help in their quest to overcome the oppressive regime in their solar system.

programme.title: Esposa joven
programme.desc: Zehra, una chica inteligente de 13 años, tiene planes para su futuro, pero es forzada a casarse con un joven millonario. Una profesora, quien es su madre en realidad, intentará ayudarla a escapar.

programme.title: Allí abajo
programme.desc: Iñaki es un vasco cuarentón aferrado a sus costumbres que nunca ha salido de Euskadi. Su vida da un giro por completo cuando tiene que acompañar a su madre Maritxu a Sevilla en un viaje del Imserso.

programme.title: Japan in Focus

programme.desc: The filmmakers shed light on Japan's social landscape through a wide range of topics, including initiatives tackling global challenges, domestic issues and trends.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.sub-title: Believe in Yourself All the Way

programme.title: IMPACTS:Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The filmmakers shed light on water bankruptcy in many regions where social and environmental factors exhaust the water supply.

programme.sub-title: How Do You Care for Loved Ones as They Age?
programme.desc: A Nepalese nursing home manager in Fukuoka Prefecture harnesses his background in IT and leads his diverse staff to give elderly residents and their families peace of mind.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: The filmmakers shed light on the exile of President Marcos Sr in the Philippines and the election of his son that leads to the public's shifting views.

programme.desc: The filmmakers explore the preparation and meticulous attention to detail to ensure a warm welcome for distinguished guests of the Imperial Palace.

programme.desc: The filmmakers explore the role of designs which are rooted in human physicality as AI, digital and virtual spaces take over.

programme.title: Tiny Desk Concerts Japan
programme.desc: ASKA, with his iconic voice and a nine-piece band, delivers an intimate and raw live performance of his top tracks, including "Say Yes" and "Hajimariwa Itsumo Ame."

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. I want to see my owner again! Charo starts his adventure back home.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Experts reveal the versatility of sweet potatoes, which are used for everything from delicious desserts to power generation.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Wildlife photographer and filmmaker Iwago Mitsuaki records the cute antics of cats he encounters in various picturesque locations across Japan.

programme.title: Anime Manga Explosion
programme.sub-title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
programme.desc: The spotlight's on That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime. Creator Fuse makes his TV debut to discuss the story's origins, and we visit the anime production to learn about the creative process.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: The filmmaker explores the streets of Erfurt, Germany, and uncovers its history rooted back in the 8th century.

programme.title: Ramen Japan
programme.desc: The filmmakers visit a restaurant in Fukuoka Prefecture that specializes in Kurume style ramen and learn a surprising story about tonkotsu ramen.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Exploring Kyo-kanoko Shibori, untying the culture bound within.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.sub-title: Handling Difficult Negotiations Over the Phone
programme.desc: Liu Yang, a Chinese sales administration officer, learns how to negotiate over the phone in Japanese.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Kanazawa Ryuji talks about how he creates a unique fish sauce from pest fish, fish that overconsume seaweed and become waste due to their strong odor.

programme.title: Another Story
programme.sub-title: President Obama in Hiroshima, Behind the Scenes of a Historical Visit
programme.desc: The host sheds light on the significance of Barack Obama visiting Hiroshima and embracing a hibakusha survivor in 2016.

programme.desc: The filmmaker takes a closer look at Kitagawa Utamaro's ukiyo-e masterpiece, "Woman with a Glass Noisemaker".

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: The sequel to the Golden Globe-nominated and AFI Award-winning "The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring," "The Two Towers" follows the continuing quest of Frodo and the Fellowship to destroy the One Ring. Frodo and Sam discover they are being followed by the mysterious Gollum. Aragorn, the Elf archer Legolas and Gimli the Dwarf encounter the besieged Rohan kingdom, whose once great King Theoden has fallen under Saruman's deadly spell.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: The culmination of nearly 10 years' work and conclusion to Peter Jackson's epic trilogy based on the timeless J.R.R. Tolkien classic, "The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King" presents the final confrontation between the forces of good and evil fighting for control of the future of Middle-earth. Hobbits Frodo and Sam reach Mordor in their quest to destroy the `one ring', while Aragorn leads the forces of good against Sauron's evil army at the stone city of Minas Tirith.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.sub-title: How Do You Care for Loved Ones as They Age?
programme.desc: A Nepalese nursing home manager in Fukuoka Prefecture harnesses his background in IT and leads his diverse staff to give elderly residents and their families peace of mind.

programme.title: Japan's Top Inventions
programme.desc: The host discovers the stories behind motorized conveyor rollers, one of the renowned Japanese products.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: Peter Barakan explores Japan's deep-rooted connection with fermented foods and the practice of chokatsu, or gut-health activities.

programme.title: Everybody Wants to Be Italian
programme.desc: Boston store owner Jake (Jay Jablonski) still loves his ex-girlfriend, Isabella (Marisa Petroro), who's now a married mom. He goes on a date with veterinarian Marisa (Cerina Vincent), during which each erroneously thinks the other is Italian. Then Isabella leaves her husband and moves in over Jake's store -- at which point he finally realizes that their relationship is over, and that he actually wants Marisa. But she's now involved with someone else... in Italy!

programme.title: One Year Off
programme.desc: A lovelorn woman and her friends are drawn to the West Indies when a colleague inherits a beachfront property.

programme.title: Permanent Midnight
programme.desc: As television writer Jerry Stahl (Ben Stiller) becomes more successful, his heroin habit grows worse. Already using when he comes to Los Angeles, Stahl finds his problems intensify when he moves in with his friend Nicky (Owen Wilson), also an addict. Eventually, Stahl marries producer Sandra (Elizabeth Hurley) to help her get a green card, and she gets him jobs on top television shows. However, more and more, he is unable to separate his addiction from his working life.

programme.title: Promised Land
programme.desc: An Idaho high-school athlete (Jason Gedrick) and cheerleader reunite years later with their friend (Kiefer Sutherland) and his reckless wife (Meg Ryan).

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: George (Paul Rudd) and Linda (Jennifer Aniston) have overextended, overstressed lives in Manhattan. After George loses his job, he and Linda have little choice but to move to Atlanta and stay with his terrible brother. On the way, the couple happen upon Elysium, an idyllic counterculture community, where money, careers and clothing are strictly optional. George and Linda think that they can make a fresh start in Elysium, only they may be trading one set of problems for another.

programme.title: Feast of Love
programme.desc: The love lives of several people of various ages intersect when a young woman named Chloe (Alexa Davalos) comes to town. Immediately, barista Oscar (Toby Hemingway) is enamored with her and thrilled when his boss, Bradley (Greg Kinnear), hires her. Then Bradley's wife, Kathryn (Selma Blair), leaves him for someone else. Afterward Bradley marries realtor Diana (Radha Mitchell), who helps the first couple move in together. Harry (Morgan Freeman) watches it all quietly and muses on love and loss.

programme.title: Joy
programme.desc: A story of a family across four generations, centered on the girl who becomes the woman (Jennifer Lawrence) who founds a business dynasty and becomes a matriarch in her own right. Facing betrayal, treachery, the loss of innocence and the scars of love, Joy becomes a true boss of family and enterprise. Allies become adversaries and adversaries become allies, both inside and outside the family, as Joy's inner life and fierce imagination carry her through the storm she faces.

programme.title: The Vow
programme.desc: Paige and Leo are happily married newlyweds, but their idyllic life together suddenly shatters when a car accident leaves her in a coma. When Paige awakes, she has severe memory loss and doesn't know Leo. She also has a confusing relationship with her parents and still harbors feelings for a former fiancé. Despite these difficult obstacles, Leo is determined to renew their bond and rebuild their marriage.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: Seven years after capturing the heart of co-anchor Veronica Corningstone (Christina Applegate), newsman Ron Burgundy (Will Ferrell) is offered the chance of a lifetime: a spot on the world's first 24-hour global cable news network. Ron quickly assembles his team: Champ Kind (David Koechner), Brian Fantana (Paul Rudd) and Brick Tamland (Steve Carell). Challenged by his tough female boss, a network owner and a popular anchor, Ron and his pals must find their own way to the top of the ratings.

programme.title: Along Came a Spider
programme.desc: A psychological suspense thriller adapted from James Patterson's first highly acclaimed novel in the Alex Cross series, Morgan Freeman reprises his role as the Washington, D.C. police detective and psychologist who is through playing mind games with criminals -- that is until a methodical predator, Gary Soneji commits a daring kidnapping and lures Cross into the case.

programme.title: American Heart
programme.desc: This unflinching drama tells the story of recently released ex-convict Jack Kelson (Jeff Bridges) as he struggles to begin a new life outside of prison and build a relationship with his estranged teenage son Nick (Edward Furlong). With the deck stacked against them, Jack falls back on old habits as they struggle amid the vagrants and criminals of an impoverished section of Seattle. Just when it appears that they might succeed, Jack's past comes back to haunt him.

programme.title: Bleed for This
programme.desc: Vinny "The Pazmanian Devil" Pazienza (Miles Teller), a local Providence boxer, shoots to stardom after winning two world title fights. After a near-fatal car accident leaves him with a broken neck, he is told he may never walk again. Against all odds and doctor's orders, renowned trainer Kevin Rooney (Aaron Eckhart) agrees to help Vinny return to the ring just a year after the accident for what could be the last fight of his life. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Goon: Last of the Enforcers
programme.desc: A lockout has reunited old teammates and brought a crew of new players to the bench for the Halifax Highlanders. Sidelined after one too many hits and now married with a baby on the way, Doug "The Thug" Glatt hangs up his skates and settles into life as an insurance salesman. But when Doug's nemesis, Anders Cain, is made captain of the Highlanders and new ownership threatens to tear his team apart, Doug is compelled back into action.

programme.title: Speaking of Sex
programme.desc: A counselor, an expert (James Spader) on depression, and two attorneys try to help a couple (Jay Mohr, Melora Walters) who have marital problems.

programme.title: White Boy Rick
programme.desc: Rick Wershe is a single father who's struggling to raise two teenagers during the height of the crack epidemic in the 1980s Detroit. Wershe sells guns illegally to make ends meet but soon attracts attention from the FBI. Federal agents convince his son, Rick Jr., to become an undercover drug informant in exchange for keeping his father out of prison. When young Rick gets in too deep, he finds himself seduced by the lure of easy money and becomes a drug dealer himself.

programme.title: White Boy Rick
programme.desc: Rick Wershe is a single father who's struggling to raise two teenagers during the height of the crack epidemic in the 1980s Detroit. Wershe sells guns illegally to make ends meet but soon attracts attention from the FBI. Federal agents convince his son, Rick Jr., to become an undercover drug informant in exchange for keeping his father out of prison. When young Rick gets in too deep, he finds himself seduced by the lure of easy money and becomes a drug dealer himself.

programme.title: Double Down
programme.desc: A bookie's threat leads four gamblers to hatch a scheme to rig the outcome of a major-league baseball game.

programme.title: Along Came a Spider
programme.desc: A psychological suspense thriller adapted from James Patterson's first highly acclaimed novel in the Alex Cross series, Morgan Freeman reprises his role as the Washington, D.C. police detective and psychologist who is through playing mind games with criminals -- that is until a methodical predator, Gary Soneji commits a daring kidnapping and lures Cross into the case.

programme.title: Rosaline
programme.desc: A comedic retelling of Shakespeare's "Romeo and Juliet," told from the point of view of Romeo's jilted ex, Rosaline, the woman Romeo first claims to love before he falls for Juliet.

programme.title: Wonderland
programme.desc: In this fact-based film, John Holmes (Val Kilmer) is one of the most successful porn stars of all time. But, when his rampant drug abuse forces him into prostitution, both his disapproving wife, Sharon (Lisa Kudrow), and his 16-year-old girlfriend, Dawn (Kate Bosworth), are on the verge of leaving him. As John sinks lower and lower into Hollywood, Calif.'s criminal underworld, he meets a seedy drug lord (Eric Bogosian) and finds himself caught up in a tragic chain of events.

programme.title: The Call
programme.desc: A veteran operator for an emergency call-center, Jordan (Halle Berry) saves lives daily as part of her job, but when a young woman's frantic report of a prowler ends tragically, Jordan is devastated. She decides to pack it in on the front lines and -- instead -- teach others the ropes of the high-pressure job. But when a call from a kidnapped teen (Abigail Breslin) comes in, Jordan takes charge as never before and turns the girl into a partner in helping to save her life.

programme.title: Marci X
programme.desc: When protest breaks out over Dr. S's new CD, the owner of the rapper's record label, Ben Feld, is hospitalized by a heart attack. But his pampered daughter Marci, who's never set foot in the business world, steps in, stands up to Dr. S, and tries to tone down his bad-boy edge.

programme.title: White Boy Rick
programme.desc: Rick Wershe is a single father who's struggling to raise two teenagers during the height of the crack epidemic in the 1980s Detroit. Wershe sells guns illegally to make ends meet but soon attracts attention from the FBI. Federal agents convince his son, Rick Jr., to become an undercover drug informant in exchange for keeping his father out of prison. When young Rick gets in too deep, he finds himself seduced by the lure of easy money and becomes a drug dealer himself.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: When Evelyn Salt (Angelina Jolie) became a CIA officer, she swore an oath to duty, honor and country. But, when a defector accuses her of being a Russian spy, Salt's oath is put to the test. Now a fugitive, Salt must use every skill gained from years of training and experience to evade capture, but the more she tries to prove her innocence, the more guilty she seems.

programme.title: 8 Mile
programme.desc: The people of Detroit know 8 Mile as the city limit, a border, a boundary. It is also a psychological dividing line that separates Jimmy Smith Jr. (Eminem) from where and who he wants to be. A provocative fictional examination of a critical week in Jimmy's life.

programme.title: The Call
programme.desc: A veteran operator for an emergency call-center, Jordan (Halle Berry) saves lives daily as part of her job, but when a young woman's frantic report of a prowler ends tragically, Jordan is devastated. She decides to pack it in on the front lines and -- instead -- teach others the ropes of the high-pressure job. But when a call from a kidnapped teen (Abigail Breslin) comes in, Jordan takes charge as never before and turns the girl into a partner in helping to save her life.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: Upper-crust executive Louis Winthorpe III (Dan Aykroyd) and down-and-out hustler Billy Ray Valentine (Eddie Murphy) are the subjects of a bet by successful brokers Mortimer (Don Ameche) and Randolph Duke (Ralph Bellamy). An employee of the Dukes, Winthorpe is framed by the brothers for a crime he didn't commit, with the siblings then installing the street-smart Valentine in his position. When Winthorpe and Valentine uncover the scheme, they set out to turn the tables on the Dukes.

programme.title: For Love of the Game
programme.desc: Forty-year-old pitcher Billy Chapel (Kevin Costner) is practically a dinosaur by professional baseball standards, fast approaching the end of his career. But, as Chapel stands on the mound pitching the game of his life, his thoughts don't turn to his prized history in sports, but rather return again and again to his tumultuous relationship with Jane Aubrey (Kelly Preston), a single mom who has stood at his side through the good and the bad but is now on the verge of leaving him.

programme.title: Crossworlds
programme.desc: A magic crystal leads a college student (Josh Charles) and an adventurer (Rutger Hauer) on a surreal quest to save the world.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Father and stepfather Dusty and Brad join forces to make Christmastime perfect for the children. Their newfound partnership soon gets put to the test when Dusty's old-school, macho dad and Brad's gentle father arrive to turn the holiday upside down. After a sudden change in plans, the four men decide to take the kids to a luxury resort for a fun-filled getaway that turns into a hilariously chaotic adventure.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: The bizarre remnants of a housing complex lie mysteriously deserted in an Ohio industrial town; experts investigate and uncover the dark, turbulent past of an oppressive steel company and labor strikes that resulted in deadly riots.

programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates the unsolved Zodiac murders; diving headfirst into the case, he meets with a retired investigator who worked the crimes, learns code breaking from a Zodiac cryptographer, visits a DNA lab, and learns a new theory.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Mohit and Kiru need Nicole and Caffery to bring a 'styled' look to their very empty new home, and Andrea's trusting her first listing to these staging masters.

programme.title: Styled

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Diane and Bernard are downsizing. They're counting on Nicole and Caffery to get them top dollar! And back in the city, Whitney is struggling to make her townhouse function properly. Nicole and Caffery bring their magic to transform this townhouse!

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Brian and Sarah create a backyard for Pam & Kevin that matches their lush forest surrounding complete with a double wrap around deck and a hot tub. The team also build a workshop for Kevin to perfect his craft of leather tooling.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Aarati & Dave both work from home, forcing their living room to be a triple duty working/living/childrens' play area. Brian and Sarah create a flexible structure, install a sleek and sophisticated plunge pool, and create an outdoor fireplace lounge.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sham, Ruban and their twin boys aren't using their big, boring backyard. To help this family embrace the great outdoors, Brian and Sarah build a vacation style getaway, with a beach volleyball court and a kid's clubhouse.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Couple Farzana & Reyan have maxed out all living space in their city-sized bungalow, leaving no room for Reyan's at-home stained glass business or Farzana's writing. Brian and Sarah build Reyan a spacious studio and construct an inspiring deck area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sandra & David's eldest daughter, Harlow, was born with vision challenges and their youngest daughter, Delilah, is just learning to walk. Brian and Sarah build a colorful playland for both children, while also building a decked out BBQ & dining area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Love is large but space is tight for Lara & Mike and their 5 children. Brian and Sarah free up space by building an activity-packed tree house and recreation court for the children, with grilling, dining and lounging areas for the whole family.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sonia & Paul are big social connectors in their community with a constant flow of visitors. Brian and Sarah turn their barren backyard into a social hotspot, complete with sunroom, giant chessboard, waterfall and stylish outdoor entertainment spaces.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: France & Marc's home is being outgrown by their sport-obsessed sons and provides no inspiring space for France to work from home. Brian and Sarah convert a rundown garage into a spot where France can work and carved out safe sports areas.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Breanna & Nick's life revolves around socializing and physical activity. Brian and Sarah convert an old, underused shed into a beautiful, zen'd out yoga studio and create backyard partying, lounging and dining areas.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Carly & Nate's social media star dog, Dean the Basset Hound, has a lot of four-legged friends visiting, leaving the home feeling cramped. Brian and Sarah make a bar/lounge for pet and owner gatherings, along with a stylish outdoor entertainment area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Amy & Terry love nothing more than spending time outside with their daughters. Brian and Sarah build a dream enclosure to hang out in on summer nights, with a swimming pool change room and a new deck where Terry can grill.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.sub-title: A Space For Dancing and Hanging
programme.desc: Susan's energetic son, Harrison, has no space to dance at home without getting under his mom's feet. Brian and Sarah build a hang out / dance space for Harrison and create a California-inspired pool and lounge area for Susan.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Cool parents, Michelle and Adrian, are passionate about music and events. Brian and Sarah tune into their needs and amp up their boring backyard with a DJ den, a creative arts-and-crafts wall, and hang-out zones for family jam sessions.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Dave and Jorge love art and entertaining, but with tenants in their basement and no creative space inside, Brian and Sarah turn their backyard into a creative party lounge and build a shipping container-inspired structure for an industrial feel.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Janet's love for her nine grandkids is endless. But so is the chaos they bring inside her home when they come visit. To take that energy outside, Brian and Sarah build a fun kid-zone in the backyard, but also a sophisticated adult area for Janet.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Paris lovers, Louise and Rick, want to share their European enthusiasm with their two daughters without racking up the mileage. Brian and Sarah build them a French-inspired urban escape. It's Paris in their backyard! C'est magnifique!

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Medical doctors and busy parents, Cynthia and Boon miss their camping adventures. Brian and Sarah perform some backyard surgery, and build them a cozy campground retreat so they can go straight from the ER to getting some R&R right in their own yard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Mom and son duo, Paul and Catharine, are overwhelmed by Paul's multi-level backyard. Paul also finds his current indoor fitness regime frustrating. Brian and Sarah muscle up to the challenge by building a gym in his backyard, alongside a hot tub.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Since having two kids, Sonia and Peter have resorted to staycations at home, but their backyard is a headache. Brian and Sarah create a luxury vacation destination that includes a pool, spa, outdoor kitchen and a stunning four-season structure.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Ex-city slickers, Lauren and Mark, miss their friends and family from the city. Brian and Sarah create a country retreat with an outdoor pad, indoor dining lounge, and a chicken coop. When Lauren and Mark's friends visit, they'll never want to leave.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: After years traveling through Europe, Iain and Alyson are ready to put down roots. Their search takes them to Inner Hebridean Island of Skye where they purchase a remote half acre plot, but building a traditional house is a challenge.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Delaval and Veronica are restoring 450 acres for conservation and funding it by building a treehouse in Swanton Novers Wood. A Scottish firm constructs it in 7 sections to minimize damage to the woodland habitat on delivery.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Jamie Feilden's 60-acre farm doubles as a charity for urban youth. To fund it, he now plans two prefabricated elliptical cabins on a remote slope. They'll feature timber decks, open-plan living, and green roofs—though weather may delay the build.

programme.title: Impossible Builds

programme.title: Putiferio va alla guerra
programme.desc: Le formiche rosse e le gialle sono in guerra. La piccola Putiferio cerca di convincere tutti gli insetti a fare pace ed unire le forze contro il nemico comune, ovvero il formichiere.

programme.title: Natura fantastica (e dove trovarla)
programme.desc: Dalle gigantesche dune di sabbia di Soussusvlei ai deserti degli Stati Uniti e dell'Australia, fino alle celestiali aurore boreali, scopriamo come il vento modelli il nostro pianeta.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From American Family Field in Milwaukee.

programme.sub-title: Washington Nationals at Chicago White Sox
programme.desc: All the latest action from Major League Baseball.

programme.title: ¿Cuál es el bueno?
programme.desc: Hoy se presentan Vielka Valenzuela, Dalilah Polanco y Ximena Cordoba, tres mujeres cazafarsantes que son expertas encontrando impostores, empezando por sus exnovios.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: XHDERBEZ es "el canal" donde Eugenio presenta bromas como si sucedieran dentro de un canal de televisión y en donde los famosos se burlan de sí mismos.

programme.title: Derbez en Cuando
programme.desc: Eloy Gameno desea realizar un trámite burocrático, pero no se pone de acuerdo con un empleado del gobierno. Una singular pareja asiste a la reunión de su antigua escuela. Nancy Uyuyuy recomienda un libro para conciliar el sueño.

programme.title: La escuelita VIP
programme.desc: Las estrellas más sobresalientes de la comedia mexicana se convierten en alumnos de la escuela, lo que da lugar a situaciones hilarantes y travesuras escolares.

programme.title: Perdiendo el juicio
programme.desc: Programa en el que se enjuicia a un famoso por alguna falta que haya cometido o por algo de lo que se le acuse en el medio artístico.

programme.title: La CQ: Nuevo ingreso
programme.sub-title: Donde manda capitana, no gobierna la porrista
programme.desc: Es el gran día de la prueba de porristas y Sofi descubrirá que sus amigas están interesadas en participar.

programme.title: La CQ: Nuevo ingreso
programme.sub-title: Tengo la personalidad, la tengo, la tengo
programme.desc: Las chicas hacen un gran trabajo para poder ganar la apuesta que realizaron en el día de la moda.

programme.title: ¿Es neta, Eva?
programme.desc: La madre de Adán se presenta en la empresa y Eva, para evitar regaños, finge que doña Aurora es una importante escritora. Por otro lado, Antonio tiene una charla con su hijo, pues este tiene la curiosidad de saber de dónde vienen los niños.

programme.title: El príncipe del barrio
programme.desc: Albertano está en problemas ya que Britney lo ha corrido de su cuarto. Ve qué hará Albertano para conseguir un nuevo hogar. Además, la nueva socia de Britney trae una tendencia en vestidos. Descubre si son de calidad.

programme.title: Está libre
programme.desc: Melquiades se ha metido en problemas, pues apostó el taxi de Concepción para pagar la fiesta de XV años de su hija Priscila. Descubre qué pasará con Melquiades y con la deuda que tiene con Concepción.

programme.title: ¿Tú crees?
programme.desc: Gaby y Plutarco buscan independizarse y, para eso, comienzan a trabajar en un supermercado.

programme.title: Tal para cual
programme.desc: Nacaranda y Nacasia se comprometen a cuidar la perrita de una de sus proveedoras de catálogo, pero en un descuido la pierden.

programme.title: Bola de locos
programme.desc: Maribel Guardia y Victoria Rufo están en busca del brujo Burundango, pues creen que les han hecho brujería ya que han perdido su talento.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico se gastó los ahorros para las compras navideñas por lo mismo debe pensar rápido para recuperar ese dinero y no dejar sin regalos a su familia, pero todo sale mal y la policía busca a Federica por pagar con cheques sin fondos.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Una familia de diez personas vive en un apartamento de sólo dos cuartos, donde reina la locura.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: El Vítor y Albertano, los galanes del barrio, tienen que pagar la renta de su apartamento, pero no encuentran trabajo y hacen muchas locuras con tal de tener un techo digno.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Un programa que relata las vidas de los habitantes de un edificio de apartamentos y cómo interactúan entre ellos. Explora de forma amena los conflictos y sucesos divertidos que pueden ocurrir entre los vecinos.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Ceci da la noticia de un posible embarazo. Fran y Lucas convencen a Paco de hacerse una vasectomía así que van con la uróloga a realizar el procedimiento.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco tiene como cliente a un galán de telenovela, lo cita en algunas ocasiones en el departamento, Toña lo reconoce y se forma un grupito de fans que lo acosa en cada visita.

programme.title: Renta congelada
programme.desc: Federico se da cuenta de que Sam se asusta fácilmente con la historia de la Planchada, y decide usar el personaje para hacer que se vayan.

programme.title: Renta congelada
programme.desc: Delia sigue a un nuevo guía espiritual y Federico se acerca a él para sacar a Sam y a Nico de la casa, por medio de amuletos.

programme.title: Alma de Ángel
programme.desc: Medellín despide a Paco y a Ángel al pensar que son pareja. Alma busca a Yolanda para aclarar sus malentendidos.

programme.title: Alma de Ángel
programme.desc: Alma es enviada al infierno por romper una promesa importante y ahora no puede visitar a su hijo en el hospital.

programme.title: Simón dice
programme.desc: Hay ratones en la Cueva del hombre y Simón decide llevar a cazar a su jauría a Planeta Café. Allí van también las chicas luego de que Betty les hace un reclamo por la suciedad.

programme.title: Simón dice
programme.desc: Bartolomé no encuentra la manera de zafarse de Carla para poder impresionar a sus vecinas. Simón, con una de sus geniales tácticas, ayuda a Bartolomé.

programme.title: Durmiendo con mi jefe
programme.desc: Edith descubre la infidelidad de Gael y lo expulsa de su casa. Carlos se compadece de él y le ofrece hospedarse en su casa justo el día en que había preparado una cena romántica con su novia Gina.

programme.title: Durmiendo con mi jefe
programme.desc: Carlos está metido en una penosa situación cuando su madre cree que él es gay; la esposa de Gael le pide a Carlos información de su esposo por lo que le triplicaría el sueldo.

programme.title: La Dr. Polo vida sin límites

María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Le dan trato preferencial a Lucha y hasta un famoso narcotraficante se pone a sus órdenes porque cree que mató a un delincuente. Albertano se corta un mechón por el cual le dan mucho dinero. Lucha se enoja muchísimo al enterarse.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Albertano le manda a María la llave de su cuarto para que saque sus cosas, pero ella entiende le pide que se mude con él, con su llave tiene una pata de conejo de la buena suerte pero al ensuciarse, María la tira y le compra una pata nueva.

programme.title: Los perversos
programme.desc: Un párroco intenta ser comprensivo y amable hacia un grupo de jóvenes con tendencias autodestructivas. Sin embargo, su buena fe lo mete en problemas.

programme.title: La escuelita VIP
programme.desc: Las estrellas más sobresalientes de la comedia mexicana se convierten en alumnos de la escuela, lo que da lugar a situaciones hilarantes y travesuras escolares.

programme.title: Hospital El Paisa
programme.desc: Cuando los clientes de un restaurante se enferman, el dueño convierte el restaurante en centro médico.

programme.title: Que madre tan padre
programme.desc: Mauricio, el padre, es un arquitecto que trabaja para una compañía prestigiosa. Maribel, la madre, es una profesional de mercadotecnia y ventas.
